step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Yes, dupilumab is effective for the treatment of asthma when used as an add-on therapy in patients with moderate-to-severe, uncontrolled asthma, particularly those with eosinophilic phenotypes or dependent on oral corticosteroids. The FDA has approved dupilumab for this indication, and studies demonstrate reduced exacerbations and improved lung function when combined with inhaled corticosteroids and LABA.
